where.if: AND (1=0 OR g.grade_nm ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR g.grade_cd ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' )

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND g.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND g.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND g.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND g.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbMemberGrade :: selectById */ g.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_mg.code_label AS grade_cd_nm FROM mb_member_grade g LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = g.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_mg ON cd_mg.code_grp = 'MEMBER_GRADE' AND cd_mg.code_value = g.grade_cd WHERE g.member_grade_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbMemberGrade :: selectList */ g.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_mg.code_label AS grade_cd_nm FROM mb_member_grade g LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = g.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_mg ON cd_mg.code_grp = 'MEMBER_GRADE' AND cd_mg.code_value = g.grade_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbMemberGrade :: selectPageList */ g.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_mg.code_label AS grade_cd_nm FROM mb_member_grade g LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = g.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_mg ON cd_mg.code_grp = 'MEMBER_GRADE' AND cd_mg.code_value = g.grade_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(g.*) /* base.ec.mb :: MbMemberGrade :: selectPageCount */ FROM mb_member_grade g
